name: Oscar Health, Inc.
description: Oscar Health, Inc. is a leading healthcare technology company with a mission to make a healthier life accessible and affordable for all. Founded in 2012, the company leverages a differentiated, full-stack technology platform to provide health insurance plans to individuals, families, and small businesses. By focusing on personalized data, member engagement, and a simplified user experience, Oscar aims to reorient the healthcare system to be more consumer-centric, acting as a trusted partner that helps members navigate the complexities of the U.S. healthcare landscape to find quality, affordable care.
